case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. MENDEL GOLDMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDMAN, MENDEL DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-15-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-22-2015

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-06-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-26-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 57724361)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-15-2015 CONTINUED TO AUG-26-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-06-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
